verbatim_text: Another thing you can do is if you're comparing a bunch of different methods, you can rank them across the different tasks that you're evaluating. And you can average the ranks. That doesn't work very well because the first place might be very, very far from the second place. And that doesn't account for things like that. And no score here will tell you how far you actually are from the state of the art on all of these problems.
